description: This image displays a logo featuring a circular green graphic to the left and text to the right. The graphic inside the circle combines a silhouette of urban buildings (representing impervious surfaces or urban areas) on the left side and a green stalk of grain or wheat (representing agriculture or vegetation) on the right side. To the right of this graphic, the text "Land" is displayed on the upper line in a darker green colour, and "Moni" is displayed directly below it, suggesting an abbreviation or partial view of "Monitoring".
